Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Nanjing Xinweihao Electronic Technology Co., Ltd..

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Xinweihao Electronic Technology Co., Ltd. provides an excellent standard demotion case of a 'micro agent for smart cards and card readers in a commercial office building' being elevated by the system to a major electronic manufacturing plant. The forensic engine has forcefully cleaned the underlying multi-million-level fake consumer electronics OEM data triggered by Apple Inc. The official commercial registry system mindlessly slapped it with the heavy-asset tag of 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing' simply because its name contains 'Electronic Technology.' However, the physical probe directly shattered its miniaturized baseline: this is a micro-enterprise with a paid-in capital of only 500,000 RMB, and its 2024 insured headcount is only '2 people.' The most fatal evidence lies in its geographical coordinates: 'Room 1113, Building D1, No. 2 Jinyuan Road, Jiangning District, Nanjing City.' In a single-room office on the 11th floor of a commercial office building, relying on 2 employees to establish an electronic device production line and a heavy processing workshop? This is a complete trampling of modern industrial common sense. Reviewing its extremely grounded true business license: 'sales of smart cards, card readers, office supplies, office equipment; sales of computer software and accessories.' The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not a major electronic manufacturing plant. This is a pure 'Micro Smart Card & Office Equipment Retailer' operating as a two-person micro-agent inside an office building. These 2 employees (highly likely a mom-and-pop shop or partners) primarily rely on reselling smart cards (IC/ID cards), card reader terminals, and daily office equipment to surrounding enterprises, access control systems, or residential property management to earn the price difference.
